meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Spira for Product Hunt Makers
products.tagline: Social media growth agents that build your momentum
products.summaryZh: 社交媒体增长代理，助你打造增长势头
products.descriptionZh: 输入你的Product Hunt链接，即可解锁你的品牌代理、创始团队的数字分身，以及能自动规划、创作并在TikTok、Instagram、X和LinkedIn发布内容的AI网红。这是你最重要的发布日，别让它溜走！
products.description: Drop your Product Hunt link and unlock your brand agent, persona clones of your founding team and AI Influencers that autonomously plan, create, and publish across TikTok, IG, X and Linkedin. It's your biggest launch day, don't let it slide away!

products.name: Agent Mode by Receiptor AI
products.tagline: Bookkeeping assistant that runs receipt workflows end-to-end
products.summaryZh: 端到端处理收据流程的记账助手
products.descriptionZh: Receiptor AI 是一款智能记账助手，能够端到端地处理您的收据工作流程：从邮箱和手机中收集收据，在云端或会计软件中整理归类，并与银行交易记录进行匹配。它能在后台静默运行，准确率达99%，仅在需要更多上下文信息时才会提问。最终效果：账目清晰、收据数据井井有条，您可以通过应用、WhatsApp，甚至直接在Claude和ChatGPT中随时查询。
products.description: Receiptor AI is an agentic bookkeeping assistant that runs your receipt workflow end-to-end: it collects receipts from your inbox and your mobile, organizes them in your cloud or accounting software, and matches them to your bank transactions. It works quietly in the background with 99% accuracy, and only asks questions when it needs more context. The result: clean books and organized receipt data you can query from anywhere: the app, WhatsApp, or right inside Claude and ChatGPT.

products.name: ClinePass
products.tagline: Run the best open-weights models in Cline
products.summaryZh: 在 Cline 中运行最佳开源权重模型
products.descriptionZh: ClinePass为Cline用户提供每月9.99美元的订阅服务，可访问GLM、Kimi、DeepSeek等顶尖开源权重编程模型。在Cline内使用这些强大模型时，享有标准API速率限制的2至5倍，无需管理多个供应商账户、API密钥、账单页面或模型可用性问题。专为希望以更简单、更快速的开源模型栈体验Cline代理式编程工作流的开发者打造。
products.description: ClinePass gives Cline users one $9.99/month subscription for top open-weight coding models like GLM, Kimi, DeepSeek, and more. Use powerful models inside Cline with 2–5x standard API rate limits, without juggling provider accounts, API keys, billing pages, or model availability. Built for developers who want Cline’s agentic coding workflow with a simpler, faster open-model stack.

products.name: VisibAI
products.tagline: Are you in AI answers? Find out and fix it in minutes
products.summaryZh: 你在AI回答中吗？几分钟内发现并修复问题。
products.descriptionZh: VisibAI 可检测您的业务是否出现在AI推荐中，并协助您进行优化。该工具在六大AI平台（ChatGPT、Perplexity、Claude、Gemini、Mistral、You.com）上运行查询，将您的可见度评分设为0-100分，揭示哪些竞争对手取而代之，并返回优先级修复清单、可直接部署的修复文件及品牌化报告。支持单次审计或月度追踪，可为代理商提供白标服务。系统部署于欧盟境内，原生符合GDPR标准。
products.description: VisibAI shows whether your business appears when people ask AI for recommendations, and helps you fix it. It runs queries across six AI platforms (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Mistral, You.com), scores your visibility 0-100, reveals which competitors show up instead, and returns a prioritized fix list plus ready-to-ship fix files and a branded report. One-off audits or monthly tracking. White-label for agencies. EU-hosted and GDPR-native.

products.name: PMB
products.tagline: Stop re-explaining your project to AI coding agents
products.summaryZh: 停止向AI编程代理重复解释你的项目。
products.descriptionZh: PMB 通过 MCP 为 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 和 Zed 提供持久化项目记忆。它将决策、经验教训、目标、近期工作、项目事实和文档存储在你磁盘上的一个 SQLite 工作区中。无需云端、无需 API 密钥、读取路径无需调用 LLM。该项目开源、离线优先、可检查/可导出，附带本地仪表盘和真实影响追踪，让你看到哪些记忆实际有用。
products.description: PMB gives Claude Code, Cursor, Codex and Zed persistent project memory through MCP. It stores decisions, lessons, goals, recent work, project facts and docs in one SQLite workspace on your disk. No cloud, no API keys, no LLM call on the read path. It is open source, offline-first, inspectable/exportable, with a local dashboard and honest impact tracking so you can see which memories actually help.

products.name: Crest
products.tagline: System stats and translation on your Mac's notch
products.summaryZh: 系统状态与翻译功能，显示在Mac的刘海区域
products.descriptionZh: Crest 是一款 Mac 刘海应用，能将 MacBook 的刘海区域变为功能中心：当前播放、仪表盘、系统状态、日历、任务、翻译等。免费使用，专业版 19.99 美元。
products.description: Crest is a Mac notch app that turns your MacBook's notch into a hub: Now Playing, a dashboard, system stats, calendar, tasks, translation and more. Free, Pro $19.99.

products.name: Sami
products.tagline: Automate ad budgets across Google, LinkedIn & Meta ads
products.summaryZh: 跨Google、LinkedIn和Meta广告的预算自动化
products.descriptionZh: 还在手动检查4个不同平台的广告效果？Sami 实现自动化。创建规则，实时暂停表现不佳的广告、控制预算、调整投放节奏——覆盖 Google、Meta、LinkedIn 和 YouTube。一个平台，无需人工盯守。深受管理 300 万美元以上广告支出的营销人员信赖。开始免费试用。
products.description: Still manually checking ad performance across 4 different platforms? Sami automates it. Build rules that pause underperformers, control budgets, and adjust pacing in real time — across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, and YouTube. One platform. Zero babysitting. Trusted by marketers managing $3M+ in ad spend. Start your free trial.

products.name: Outpaint - Ad Reframe
products.tagline: AI to turn vertical UGC into widescreen ads
products.summaryZh: AI将竖屏UGC转化为宽屏广告
products.descriptionZh: Outpaint.com 将用户生成广告重新构架为电视广告。竖屏广告（9:16）扩展为宽屏（16:9）以适应联网电视，同时保持原始素材像素级完美。效果优于信箱模式与侧边模糊处理。
products.description: UGC ads reframed for TV by Outpaint.com. Vertical ads (9:16) expanded into widescreen (16:9) for connected TV, while keeping the original footage pixel perfect. Outperforms pillarboxing and side blur.

products.name: Intelli
products.tagline: Convert leads into customers with AI conversations
products.summaryZh: 用AI对话将潜在客户转化为实际客户
products.descriptionZh: Intelli 是一款面向新兴市场中小企业的 WhatsApp Business API 平台。可在 WhatsApp、网页聊天、Instagram、Messenger 和邮件中，一站式实现客户互动自动化、广播活动运营、收款及支持管理。AI 助手基于自有数据训练，配备客户旅程工作流与本地支付通道。
products.description: Intelli is a WhatsApp Business API platform for SMBs in emerging markets. Automate customer engagement, run broadcast campaigns, collect payments, and manage support from one place across WhatsApp, web chat, Instagram, Messenger, and email. AI assistants are trained on your own data, with customer journey workflows and local payment rails.

products.name: Upstream FTP
products.tagline: A fast, beautiful, and native FTP/SFTP client for macOS
products.summaryZh: 一款快速、美观且原生的macOS FTP/SFTP客户端
products.descriptionZh: Upstream 是一款专为 macOS 打造的原生、现代且轻量级的 FTP/SFTP 客户端。它追求速度与无缝集成，摒弃了臃肿过时的界面，为开发者和系统管理员提供快速、安全且美观的文件传输体验。
products.description: Upstream is a native, modern, and lightweight FTP/SFTP client built exclusively for macOS. Designed for speed and seamless integration, it ditches heavy, outdated interfaces to give developers and sysadmins a fast, secure, and beautiful file transfer experience.

products.name: Mailgent
products.tagline: AI agents that can email, pay APIs, sign, and store secrets
products.summaryZh: 能够发送邮件、支付API、签署文件并存储密钥的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: 智能体反复撞上同一堵墙：没有收件箱、没有安全的凭证存储、无法通过2FA验证、无法为下游API付费、没有可验证的身份。Mailgent通过一次curl调用解决这些问题。每个智能体都能获得真实收件箱（支持DKIM、邮件线程）、加密保险库、TOTP/2FA、用于x402定价API支付的USDC钱包、可验证DID（Ed25519）以及日历。原生支持MCP协议。兼容Claude、Cursor、OpenAI、LangChain、CrewAI、Hermes Agent、OpenClaw、NemoClaw、n8n等平台。数秒内即可全部上线运行。
products.description: Agents keep hitting the same walls: no inbox, no safe credential store, no way past a 2FA gate, no way to pay for a downstream API, no verifiable identity. Mailgent fixes this in one curl call. Every agent gets a real inbox (DKIM, threading), encrypted vault, TOTP/2FA, USDC wallet for x402-priced API payments, verifiable DID (Ed25519), and a calendar. MCP-native. Works with Claude, Cursor, OpenAI, LangChain, CrewAI, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, NemoClaw, n8n, and more. Everything live in seconds.

products.name: TanStarter
products.tagline: Ship Faster with TanStack, Cost Less with Cloudflare
products.summaryZh: 使用TanStack加速交付，借助Cloudflare降低成本
products.descriptionZh: TanStarter 是一套完整的 TanStack Start 样板工程，用于构建盈利型 SaaS 产品，集成了 AI、身份认证、数据库、存储、博客、邮件、新闻通讯、支付、仪表盘、SEO 等功能，并完整部署在 Cloudflare Workers 上。
products.description: TanStarter is the complete TanStack Start boilerplate for building profitable SaaS, packed with AI, auth, database, storage, blog, email, newsletter, payments, dashboard, SEO, and more, fully deployed on Cloudflare Workers

products.name: Loop by ads.expert
products.tagline: The flight simulator for paid media, with built in AI coach
products.summaryZh: 付费媒体飞行模拟器，内置AI教练
products.descriptionZh: 大多数人学习Google Ads只有两种方式：看课程，或者烧真金白银试错。Loop是第三种方式。搭建真实广告系列，在实时竞价模拟中运行，观察展示量、点击量和转化量如何逐周与模拟对手博弈。AI教练ARIA会解释每个数字变动的原因，并指出下一步优化方向。VERA甚至能用同一套引擎审计你的真实Google Ads账户。零风险，免费开始。
products.description: Most people learn Google Ads two ways: watch a course, or burn real budget making mistakes. Loop is the third way. Build a real campaign, run it through a live auction simulation, and watch impressions, clicks, and conversions play out week by week against simulated competitors. ARIA, an AI coach, explains why every number moved and what to fix next. VERA can even audit your real Google Ads account against the same engine. Risk-free. Free to start.

products.name: Oculta
products.tagline: Invisible notes for meetings and presentations
products.summaryZh: 会议与演示的隐形笔记
products.descriptionZh: Oculta 是一款 Mac 应用，让你在演示、共享屏幕或加入视频通话时阅读笔记，而其他人无法看到。保持脚本、发言要点和提醒仅对你可见，同时维持眼神交流。Oculta 在屏幕共享、截图和录屏中保持不可见。兼容 Zoom、Google Meet、Microsoft Teams、Slack、FaceTime 以及 macOS 上的所有其他应用。
products.description: Oculta is a Mac app that lets you read notes while presenting, sharing your screen, or joining video calls without anyone else seeing them. Keep scripts, talking points, and reminders visible only to you while maintaining eye contact. Oculta stays invisible in screen sharing, screenshots, and recordings. Works with Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, Slack, FaceTime, and every other app on macOS.

products.name: NerdSip - Microlearning App
products.tagline: Replace social media with real learning - and get educated.
products.summaryZh: 用真实学习替代社交媒体，获得真正的教育。
products.descriptionZh: NerdSip是一款AI学习应用，可在数秒内为任何主题创建个性化微课程。它包含游戏化连续打卡机制、角色扮演元素以及五分钟课程，专为求知者设计。
products.description: NerdSip is the AI learning app that creates custom micro-courses on any topic in seconds. Gamified streaks, RPG elements, and 5-minute lessons for curious minds.

products.name: Downbar
products.tagline: Know the moment a service breaks, and the moment it's back
products.summaryZh: 了解服务中断的时刻，以及服务恢复的时刻。
products.descriptionZh: Downbar 是一款售价 2.99 美元的 macOS 菜单栏应用，可监控 110 多个公共状态页面。涵盖 AI、云服务、开发工具、支付等领域——一旦服务出现故障或恢复，它会立即通知你。
products.description: Downbar is a $2.99 macOS menu-bar app that watches 110+ public status pages. AI, cloud, dev tools, payments — and tells you the moment something goes down, and the moment it recovers.

products.name: ReadHere
products.tagline: Lightweight PDF & EPUB reader in your browser
products.summaryZh: 轻量级PDF与EPUB阅读器，运行于浏览器中
products.descriptionZh: 轻量级PDF和EPUB阅读器，完全运行于浏览器中；无需安装、无需账户、无需生态。支持两种格式的高亮标注、单本书籍阅读笔记，并可离线阅读。文件始终保留在您的设备上。即将支持同步至个人Google Drive。
products.description: A lightweight reader for your PDFs and EPUBs, entirely in your browser; no install, no account, no ecosystem. Highlight both formats, keep a per-book journal, and read offline. Your files stay on your device. Sync to your own Google Drive coming soon.

products.name: Blinked
products.tagline: LinkedIn outreach without breaking the law
products.summaryZh: 合规的LinkedIn客户拓展
products.descriptionZh: 免费的Chrome扩展，帮助你在LinkedIn上研究潜在客户、个性化消息并管理外联。本地优先。你的数据永不离开浏览器。
products.description: A free Chrome extension that helps you research leads, personalize messages, and manage outreach on LinkedIn. Local first. Your data never leaves your browser.

products.name: KEEP
products.tagline: The connected keychain that keeps your people close
products.summaryZh: 连接你与亲友的智能钥匙扣
products.descriptionZh: KEEP是一款带有电子墨水屏的互联钥匙链，可保存一条来自他人手机的信息——无论对方身在何处，都能发送文字、涂鸦或贴纸。无需WiFi、蓝牙或电池。只需随身携带一份心爱之人的印记，无论走到哪里。来自Lovebox团队：已向40多个国家发货超过30万件，自2017年以来已发送超过2600万条信息。现已在Kickstarter上线！上线不到2小时即完成众筹目标，目前达成率300%！Kickstarter上预购还剩12天。
products.description: KEEP is a connected keychain with an e-ink screen that holds one note — a word, a drawing, a sticker — sent from someone's phone, from anywhere. No WiFi, no Bluetooth, no battery. Just a piece of someone you love, with you wherever you go. From the team behind Lovebox: 300,000+ shipped to 40+ countries, 26M+ notes sent since 2017. Live on Kickstarter now! Funded in under 2 hours and 300% funded as of today! 12 days remaining to pre-order on Kickstarter.

products.name: LocoPast - Discover History All Around
products.tagline: The location-based history app - explore the world's history
products.summaryZh: 基于位置的历史应用——探索世界历史
products.descriptionZh: LocoPast 揭示你身边隐藏的非凡历史——战争、艺术家、丑闻与奇观，皆标注于它们发生的街道上。选择你的当前位置，或搜索全球任意地点、城市或遗址，即可揭示那里曾发生的一切。可在“最重要”与“最近”之间筛选，并按战争与战役、政治、科学与贸易、艺术与文化等类别进行过滤。
products.description: LocoPast reveals the remarkable history hidden around you - battles, artists, scandals and wonders, mapped to the streets where they happened. Select your own location or search any location, city or sites in the world, to reveal everything that happened there. Filter between "most significant" and "nearest" and filter by categories such as wars and battles, politics, science and trade, arts and culture, and much more.
